code_dossier.name: UpdateUserInfoResponse.java
code_dossier.description: DTO class for encapsulating the response of user information update operations, extending BaseResponse to provide standardized response structure with code and message fields.

data.detailed_description:
UpdateUserInfoResponse is a Data Transfer Object (DTO) class that serves as the response wrapper for user information update operations in the account management API module. 

This class follows a common design pattern where it extends a base response class (BaseResponse) to inherit standard response fields including:
- A response code (ToBCodeEnum) indicating success or specific error conditions
- A message string providing human-readable status information

The class itself is intentionally minimal and empty, relying entirely on inheritance from BaseResponse for its functionality. This design allows for:
1. Consistent response structure across all API endpoints
2. Easy extension if user update-specific response fields are needed in the future
3. Type safety when distinguishing between different API response types

Currently, the class does not define any additional fields specific to user update responses, suggesting that the base response fields (code and message) are sufficient for the current business requirements. The class is positioned in the DTO layer of the account-api module, indicating it's meant for API contract definition and data transfer between service layers.
responsibilities: Encapsulate user information update operation response data
Provide standardized response structure through BaseResponse inheritance
Enable type-safe API response handling for user update operations
Maintain consistency with other API response DTOs in the system

interfaces.name: UpdateUserInfoResponse
interfaces.description: DTO class extending BaseResponse for user information update responses, inherits default constructor and parameterized constructor from parent class
